hypothesis: an jom boro boro. kela nani are giri. nam hela akwa, iza atenga nadala kala, bala arala.

reference: Devit lɩɩsɛ Levi doho nɩaa dɔnsʋŋ dɩ ba tɩtɩŋ La TƖƖNA niiriŋ daga-la sɩpaaŋ, dɩ ba du kɩaa a yɩɩ yɩɩlaa a dɛnnɛ La TƖƖNA Iziral tɩŋŋaa Wɩa.
hypothesis: Debile se, debile duhu ni a drun son, debete then, lathina niire da kala, sepang, debai dukia, aye, yeela, adane lathina ziathangavi.

reference: Asaf nɛ fa ŋaa nɩalɩŋ ʋ sɩ lɩɩsa kʋhɩaŋ, Zɛkarɩya tɩtɩgɛ. Ba harɩŋ nɩaa ma nɛ ŋ-la: Jɛyɛl, Sɛmɩramɔf, Jɛhɩɛl, Matɩtɩa, Ɛlɩab, Bɛnaaya, Ɔbɛd-Ɛdɔm arɩ Jɛyɛl. Ba nɛ faa du kɔnɛba arɩ chenniŋ, ka Asaf ma chɩchɩgɩsɛ buguloo.
hypothesis: Asaav Ne fa, nga ni alan Usallee sa ko hiyan. Zakariya, Titike, Baharan, Maniyan ne enla, Jael, Sameramuuf, Jahiyel, Matatia, Eliab, Benaya, Obe-Edom, ari Jael. Bane fa, du konoba, ari chennin, ka Asaav, ma chichegise, bugulo.

reference: Bɛnaaya arɩ Jahazɩɛl sɩ ŋaa Wɩɩsʋllɩ sɩpaalaaraa ma nɛ faa ŋmʋʋ nyilliŋ Wɩa niiriŋ daga-la sɩpaaŋ bʋa na-kala.
hypothesis: Benaya, aare, Jahazial, Senga, Wesa Sepaalaara, manafaa ngmu, nyinling, Wesa niiren daka la Sepaang, Buona kala.

reference: Tapʋlɩɩ-la Devit leŋ Asaf arɩ ʋ harɩŋ nɩaa yɩɩ yɩɩlɩŋ deeŋ a dɛnnɛ La TƖƖNA:
hypothesis: Ta pɔle la debiinɛ̃ a sa-aare o haara nnia a yelindɛɛng adanla tiin.

reference: Má lɔllɛ La TƖƖNA, má yɩrɛ ʋ yɩrɩŋ. Má leŋ dɩ tinteyee nɩaa nɩɩ wɩalɩŋ ʋ sɩ ŋaa.
hypothesis: mɛlaa lala tena mɛ yɛrɛ o yɛrɛm mɛlɛndi tinti yɛniaani viaarɛ osɛnga

reference: Má yɩɩ yɩɩlaa a dɛnnɛ La TƖƖNA, má bʋl wʋkpuŋkperisi-la kala ʋ sɩ ŋaa a pɩ nɩaa.
hypothesis: ma yeli la adan latena maboli ukungwersila kala osanga ape unia

reference: Má leŋ dɩ ma tʋɔŋ tɔrɛ a tɩŋ ma sɩ ŋaa ʋ nɩaa, ma nɩalɩŋ kala sɩ ŋaa ʋ nɩaa, má jʋjʋɔsɛ.
hypothesis: Mali de matuon tare a temase nga unia. Mani alen kalase nga unia. Maje juase.

reference: Má joŋ ma yɩɛlaa hɛ La TƖƖNA doluŋ lɛ, aŋ chɩchɛʋ bʋa na-kala.
hypothesis: Mɛ jomai yala he latie na dolin le. An jico buona kala.

reference: Má liisi wʋkpuŋkperisi-la arɩ wʋduoru-la ʋ sɩ ŋaa arɩ ŋɩɩ ʋ sɩ dii sarɩya ʋ bʋa lɛ,
hypothesis: Melisi, un kuŋ kpe sela, ari udurela, osɛŋa, arɛ ŋi osidi sara ya ubwalɛ.

reference: ma-na Iziral tɩŋŋaa sɩ ŋaa ʋ tɩntɩnna doho nɩaa, Jekɔb biiriŋ, nɩalɩŋ ʋ sɩ lɩɩsa.
hypothesis: Manna iza tangaa senga otuntunna dohunia, Jokob biiring nyalen osale

reference: Ʋ nɛ La TƖƖNA Wɩa, ʋ niiŋ wɩaa hɛ dʋnɩa lee-kala nɛ.
hypothesis: Bà nɛ lachi na via. Wuni viɛhe dunya le ka la ni.

reference: Ʋ bɩ nii-la ʋ sɩ bile ʋ dɩ ma pɛgɛ ka yʋ, nii-la sɩ hɛ nɩmɛ a kaa mʋ wuu,
hypothesis: nila, ose bile odema baka kayo. Nila se he name akamo wu

reference: nii-la ʋ sɩ bile ʋ dɩ Abɩraham arɩ Aɩzɩk pɛgɛ.
hypothesis: Niela Osubille, o de Abraham, ara azek paka.

reference: Ʋ leŋe nii-la chɩŋ nɛ a pɩ Jekɔb, a leŋ ʋ ŋaa nii sɩ hɛ ʋ dɩ Iziral pɛgɛ a kaa mʋ wuu.
hypothesis: Ooleŋ nɛɛ laa chɛn nɛɛ, a fɛɛjaakɔɔ elɛŋ oonga niseheɛ odɛɛ, zaa paka akaamugu.

reference: Ʋ sɩ, “Mɩ jaŋ joŋ Kɛnaŋ tinteeŋ pɩŋ dɩ ʋ ŋaa ŋ kʋŋ.”
hypothesis: Mese, me yɛn jɔŋ ke nanteŋ teŋ pɛŋ de ɔŋa n ko.

reference: Bʋa-la lɛ ba fa bɩ wɩɩ maga, ba chaasa muuri nɛ a ŋaa nʋhʋɔra ma tintee-la lɛ.
hypothesis: waala le basibe wema ka bachasenuure ne anga nuhorama tintila le

reference: Ba fa gɔllɔɔ baarɛ nɛ, a lɩɩ tintee a mʋ tintee.
hypothesis: Ma fa gola barne ale tintie amo tintie

reference: Ʋ bɩ leŋe nʋʋkala dɔgɩsɛba, a tɩŋ ba wɩaa, ʋ dɔgɩsɛ kuoroo nɛ.
hypothesis: U bidleŋe no kala dog sebaa, a temba via o dog se kuuru ne.

reference: Ʋ sɩ, “Ma pʋpɔ má sɩ́ mɩ nɩaa mɩ sɩ lɩɩsa digu, a sɩ́ mɩ wʋlaabʋllaa ma wʋbɔŋ kala ŋaa.”
hypothesis: wɔ sɛ, ma pɔpɔ ma sε mɛnnya, mɛsɛ lisɛ diku, asε mɛ walabɔla ma wɔbɔn kɛlɛnga

reference: Má yɩɩ yɩɩlaa pɩ La TƖƖNA, dʋnɩa nɩaa arɩ kʋŋkala. Tapʋlɩɩ kala, má heele bʋl ŋɩɩ ʋ sɩ laala ta.
hypothesis: Maye yila, fe latena, donia nia, ara kon kala, tapule kala, mehile bulenge o salala ta.

reference: Má heele bʋl ʋ ballɩŋ wɩaa arɩ tɩntɩŋ-duoru-la ʋ sɩ tɩma a pɩ tinteyee nɩaa kala.
hypothesis: maheere bol o balanya are chin chin duure la o satama apay tin teyeni a kala

reference: La TƖƖNA nɛ yʋga kɩɩ kʋŋkala a magɛ dɩ la faasa dɛnnʋ, ʋ nɛ maga dɩ la fá a kɩɩ vene kala.
hypothesis: na ti na no yoka ke konka la amage de la fa song dyanon onoma ka de la fa aki veneka

reference: Tintee wogusuŋ nɩaa kala kpaarɛ vesiŋ nɛ, ama La TƖƖNA nɛ ŋaa wɩa-nyuŋ.
hypothesis: tin te wuosin ni kala kwari vesin ne amala ti na ni nga viyonyu

reference: Zɔmʋŋ arɩ ballɩŋ kala hɛ ʋ teeŋ, doluŋ arɩ tʋɔtɔrʋŋ su ʋ dɩa kala.
hypothesis: zamang are balang kalɛɛhɛ utii ne dulung are tuatorong su odia ka

reference: Má dɛnnɛ La TƖƖNA, tintee-na kala nɩaa, má dɛnnɛ La TƖƖNA a tɩŋ ʋ tʋla arɩ ʋ doluŋ wɩaa.
hypothesis: Madan latena, tintentena kalan ya, madan latena atan otula ari u dolu wiya.

reference: Má dɛnnɛ La TƖƖNA yɩrɩ-balɩŋ, má kɛŋ Wɩɩsʋlʋŋ kɩaa kaa kʋ jʋʋ ʋ dɩɩ-balɩŋ. Má kpirime chʋɔlɛ La TƖƖNA sɩ bɩ disiniŋ kɛnɛ.
hypothesis: ma daana laatina yirbalan, maba kaŋ weesolunkya ko dyoodee balan, ma kireme chuo la laatina sibedisinun kany.

reference: Kʋŋ na-kala sɩ hɛ dʋnɩa lɛ, má chichel ʋ sɩpaaŋ. Tinteeŋ chɩna nɛ kpaŋkpaŋ, kʋŋkala bɩ jaŋ wuo kɛnʋ jigisi.
hypothesis: Koɔnna kala seɛ duna le, mɛ cɛ cɛlɔɔ sapaan, tiin teɛ cɛnaana kwan kwan, kuun kala bɛ jɛngu kanu jikisi.

reference: Kɩalɩŋ kala sɩ hɛ wɩa-nyuŋ, má jʋjʋɔsɛ, dɩ kɩalɩŋ ma sɩ hɛ tinteeŋ lɛ tʋɔŋ tɔrɛ. Má bʋla pɩ tinteyee nɩaa arɩ La TƖƖNA nɛ kuoro.
hypothesis: kyala n kyala ste hegye nyung ma jua se de kyala ma se hetiintee n le tuon tore mabula pi tintee nya a latine ne kuro

reference: Mʋgʋ-balɩŋ arɩ kɩalɩŋ kala sɩ hɛ ʋ tʋɔŋ, má ŋaa goŋ, bagɩsɩŋ arɩ kʋduuloo kala, má jʋjʋɔsɛ.
hypothesis: mɔɔ gba laŋ are kɛ ya laŋ kɛlɛ se he ɔ tuɔŋ, maŋ a guŋ baŋ sɔŋ are ku duulo kɛlɛ, ma jɛ juo se.

reference: Tɩɩsɩŋ ma kala sɩ hɛ duuŋ lɛ, jaŋ yɩɩ yɩɩlaa arɩ tʋɔtɔrʋŋ a pɩ La TƖƖNA. Ʋ jaŋ kʋ dii dʋnɩa nɩaa kala sarɩya.
hypothesis: Tiesung makala se duna le gyanyee yela are tootoron ape latena o gyanko di dunya niyaa saree.

reference: Má lɔllɛ La TƖƖNA, bɛɛ wɩaa ʋ wɩaa zɔmɔ, ʋ chonuŋ bɩ dɛrɛ.
hypothesis: malla le la tena be bi ya o wia zomo, u chunun be dere.

reference: Má bʋla pʋ, “Laala ta, La TƖƖNA Wɩa, laala ta tinteyee nɩaa nɩsɩŋ lɛ aŋ kɛnla kʋ hɛ dɔŋɔ, dɩ la wuo lɔllʋŋ a dɛnnɛ ŋ yɩrɩ-balɩŋ sɩ bɩ disiniŋ kɛnɛ.”
hypothesis: la blafuo lalata latinabya lalata tintiyee niyaansele ankan lakoeh dongo de lewu lonlon adenin yirbalan sebedisin ninkane

reference: Má dɛnnɛ La TƖƖNA Iziral tɩŋŋaa Wɩa a kaa mʋ wuu. Ŋɩɩ nɛ nɩalɩŋ kala bʋl, ‘Amɩɩ’ a dɛnnɛ La TƖƖNA.
hypothesis: Mma dyan na la ti da n isiri a tin ga biya aka mu wu, nge ne ni a leng kala bol, a men a dyan na la ti

reference: Ŋɩɩ nɛ Devit leŋ Asaf arɩ ʋ harɩŋ nɩalɩŋ hɛ Wɩa niiriŋ daga-la teeŋ aa dɛnnɛ La TƖƖNA bʋa na-kala a ŋaa wɩalɩŋ sɩ maga baa ŋaa tapʋlɩɩ kala.
hypothesis: N yina devi le ni asare are ohare ne alan he vieni ren dakale thin ar da na la tina buana kala anga wiyan samaka ba anga chappe le kala.

reference: Ʋ leŋ Jedutuŋ nanʋala Ɔbɛd-Ɛdɔm arɩ ʋ harɩŋ nɩaa mahɩŋ batori arɩ chori ma pɛ ba lɛ ba tɩtɩŋ. Hosa arɩ Ɔbɛd-Ɛdɔm nɛ faa pɔ dɩa-la boiŋ niiree.
hypothesis: buleŋ ye dutuo, nanwola, obe edom. Are oharaŋ nia maham baturie, are cuoru mapɛ bale batataŋ. Hosa are obe edonne fapoo, diala wen niire.

reference: Devit fa leŋe Zadɔk sɩ ŋaa Wɩɩsʋllɩ sɩpaalaara arɩ Wɩɩsʋllɩ sɩpaalaaraa dɔnsʋŋ ma faa tɩŋ La TƖƖNA dɩ-zɔŋ-la lɛ nɛ, dundolo-la nyuŋ ba sɩɩ chʋɔlɛ Wɩa Gibioŋ lɛ.
hypothesis: Dɛɛ fɛllɛngɛ zaa dɔɔ sɔnga wɛɛ sɔnɔ la sapaala ra. Arɛ wɛɛ tɔnna sapaala ra. Dɔɔ sɔn ma faa tɛng. Lɔtina dii zɔn la lɛnɛ. Dundiɛlɛ lɛ nyung, basɛɛ cuo lɛ, viɛɛ gɛɛ diɔn lɛ.

reference: Ba nɛ yie nyɩgɛ kʋnyɩgaa Wɩɩsʋlʋŋ kɩaa chʋchʋɔŋ arɩ dɩdaanɩŋ tapʋlɩɩ kala Wɩɩsʋllɩ koruŋ nyuŋ, arɩ ŋɩɩ ba sɩ ŋmʋnsa hɛ La TƖƖNA wombiiŋ teniŋ tʋɔŋ a pɩ Iziral tɩŋŋaa dɩ ba tuto.
hypothesis: Bɛni yɛɛ nyɛ kɛ, konyɛ ka wɛ suluŋ ki a kye tuong, ara dɛ daana, tapɔlɛ kala, wɛ suluŋ, kuruŋ nyuŋ, ara ŋge basuŋ mɛn sɛ hɛ lɔtine wɛn biŋ, tɛniŋ tuong, a pɛ itɛatɛŋa, dɛ bɛ tu tu

reference: Devit fa bɩra lɩɩsɛ Hemaŋ arɩ Jedutuŋ nɛ arɩ nɩaa dɔnsʋŋ dɩ ba dɩdɛnnɛ La TƖƖNA, a tɩŋ ʋ chonuŋ sɩ bɩ dɛrɛ wɩaa.
hypothesis: de be fa bra le ce he man are de du tung ne are ne a dong song de ba de danne la te na a teng o cho nu se be de r ya.
